requirement_topic.zh: 交流充电接口标准（Type 2）——保加利亚
requirement_topic.zht: 交流充電接口標準（Type 2）——保加利亞

summary.en: EU public AC recharging points are subject to AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Type 2 for normal-power AC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-2 describes the Type 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR, while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route. Bulgaria as an EU member state is directly bound by AFIR, which entered into force 13 April 2024.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共交流充电点受AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定普通功率交流充电点采用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR，IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。保加利亚作为欧盟成员国直接受AFIR约束，该法规已于2024年4月13日生效。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共交流充電點受AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定普通功率交流充電點採用Type 2。IEC/EN 62196-2描述Type 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR，IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。保加利亞作為歐盟成員國直接受AFIR約束，該法規已於2024年4月13日生效。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.2 for AC charging, which defines a physically distinct 7-pin connector incompatible with IEC Type 2. GB/T plugs cannot mate with EU Type 2 sockets.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电采用GB/T 20234.2标准，定义了与IEC Type 2物理上不兼容的7针接口。GB/T插头无法与欧盟Type 2插座配合使用。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電採用GB/T 20234.2標準，定義了與IEC Type 2物理上不相容的7針接口。GB/T插頭無法與歐盟Type 2插座配合使用。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. A Chinese EV or EVSE designed only around a GB/T AC interface cannot interoperate with EU public Type 2 AC infrastructure in Bulgaria without a physical inlet/socket and control-interface redesign. The connector body, pin count, and locking mechanism all differ. Any adapter strategy for public infrastructure must be checked against AFIR and Bulgarian local safety rules rather than treated as a substitute for compliant connector design.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅围绕GB/T交流接口设计的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计物理插座/接口及控制接口的情况下，无法与保加利亚欧盟公共Type 2交流基础设施互操作。接口外形、针脚数量及锁定机构均不相同。公共基础设施中的任何转接方案均须按AFIR及保加利亚当地安全规则核查，不能视为合规接口设计的替代。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅圍繞GB/T交流接口設計的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計物理插座/接口及控制接口的情況下，無法與保加利亞歐盟公共Type 2交流基礎設施互操作。接口外形、針腳數量及鎖定機構均不相同。公共基礎設施中的任何轉接方案均須按AFIR及保加利亞當地安全規則核查，不能視為合規接口設計的替代。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible AC recharging points in Bulgaria, including Type 2 availability as specified in Annex II. IEC/EN 62196-2 is the voluntary technical connector standard used to implement that legal requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.2 required for EV sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for EU/Bulgarian public charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T AC. EU public AC infrastructure must meet AFIR connector requirements, and IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2 is the technical specification used for that route. GB/T AC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Type 2 compatibility in Bulgaria.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T交流接口，则就欧盟/保加利亚公共充电互操作性而言现状不合规。欧盟公共交流基础设施须满足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2是该路径采用的技术规格。GB/T交流接口不能替代保加利亚符合AFIR要求的Type 2兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T交流接口，則就歐盟/保加利亞公共充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。歐盟公共交流基礎設施須滿足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-2 Type 2是該路徑採用的技術規格。GB/T交流接口不能替代保加利亞符合AFIR要求的Type 2相容性。

requirement_topic.en: DC Fast-Charging Connector Standard (CCS Combo 2) — Bulgaria
requirement_topic.zh: 直流快充接口标准（CCS Combo 2）——保加利亚
requirement_topic.zht: 直流快充接口標準（CCS Combo 2）——保加利亞

summary.en: EU public DC recharging points are subject to AFIR (Regulation (EU) 2023/1804) requirements for connector availability. AFIR Annex II specifies Combo 2 for high-power DC recharging points. IEC/EN 62196-3 describes the CCS Combo 2 technical connector design; the legal obligation is AFIR, while the IEC/EN standard is the technical specification route. Bulgaria is directly bound by AFIR as an EU member state.
summary.zh: 欧盟公共直流充电点受AFIR（法规（EU）2023/1804）关于接口可用性的要求约束。AFIR附件II规定高功率直流充电点采用Combo 2。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技术设计；法律义务来自AFIR，IEC/EN标准是技术规格路径。保加利亚作为欧盟成员国直接受AFIR约束。
summary.zht: 歐盟公共直流充電點受AFIR（法規（EU）2023/1804）關於接口可用性的要求約束。AFIR附件II規定高功率直流充電點採用Combo 2。IEC/EN 62196-3描述CCS Combo 2接口的技術設計；法律義務來自AFIR，IEC/EN標準是技術規格路徑。保加利亞作為歐盟成員國直接受AFIR約束。

summary.en: China uses GB/T 20234.3 for DC fast charging, defining a physically distinct 9-pin connector incompatible with CCS Combo 2. The pin layout, communication protocol (CAN vs. PLC), and inlet shape all differ.
summary.zh: 中国直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3标准，定义了与CCS Combo 2物理上不兼容的9针接口。针脚布局、通信协议（CAN与PLC）及接口外形均不相同。
summary.zht: 中國直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3標準，定義了與CCS Combo 2物理上不相容的9針接口。針腳佈局、通訊協定（CAN與PLC）及接口外形均不相同。

gap.en: Hardware connector is physically incompatible. Chinese EVs or EVSE with only a GB/T DC interface cannot fast-charge at Bulgarian/EU CCS2 public stations without hardware and communication-stack redesign. The vehicle/charger communication stack (GB/T 27930 CAN vs. ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC pathways in common EU CCS practice) also differs, compounding the incompatibility beyond the physical plug.
gap.zh: 硬件接口物理不兼容。仅配备GB/T直流接口的中国电动汽车或充电设备，在未重新设计硬件及通信协议栈的情况下，无法在保加利亚/欧盟CCS2公共快充站充电。车辆/充电设备通信协议（GB/T 27930 CAN与欧盟CCS实践中常见的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC路径）也不同，进一步加剧了插头之外的不兼容性。
gap.zht: 硬件接口物理不相容。僅配備GB/T直流接口的中國電動汽車或充電設備，在未重新設計硬件及通訊協議棧的情況下，無法在保加利亞/歐盟CCS2公共快充站充電。車輛/充電設備通訊協定（GB/T 27930 CAN與歐盟CCS實務中常見的ISO 15118 / DIN 70121 PLC路徑）也不同，進一步加劇了插頭之外的不相容性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory legal obligation: AFIR requirements for publicly accessible high-power DC recharging points in Bulgaria, including Combo 2 availability as specified in Annex II. IEC/EN 62196-3 is the voluntary technical connector standard used to implement that legal requirement.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory in China for domestic market — GB/T 20234.3 required for DC fast-charge EV sold in China

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Non-compliant for EU/Bulgarian public DC charging interoperability as-is if the product only supports GB/T DC. EU public DC infrastructure must meet AFIR connector requirements, and IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2 is the technical specification used for that route. GB/T DC interfaces are not a substitute for AFIR-compliant Combo 2 compatibility in Bulgaria.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 若产品仅支持GB/T直流接口，则就欧盟/保加利亚公共直流充电互操作性而言现状不合规。欧盟公共直流基础设施须满足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2是该路径采用的技术规格。GB/T直流接口不能替代保加利亚符合AFIR要求的Combo 2兼容性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 若產品僅支援GB/T直流接口，則就歐盟/保加利亞公共直流充電互操作性而言現狀不合規。歐盟公共直流基礎設施須滿足AFIR接口要求，IEC/EN 62196-3 CCS Combo 2是該路徑採用的技術規格。GB/T直流接口不能替代保加利亞符合AFIR要求的Combo 2相容性。
